name: Elderly home care
description: Provides personalised home care visits to 1,800 elderly residents aged 65+. Covers personal hygiene, medication administration, meal support and 24-hour alarm response. 320 care workers across 4 districts. Managed via ElderCare Pro and Social Worker Scheduler.

name: Addiction support
description: Outpatient and residential treatment programmes for substance addiction under SoL legislation. Serves 640 registered individuals with treatment plans, social support and crisis intervention. Still reliant on the legacy Addiction Tracker system pending national SoL Connect migration.

name: Primary schools
description: Municipally operated compulsory education for 4,200 pupils ages 6-16 across 18 schools. Includes curriculum delivery, special needs support, school meals and transport. LearningPortal, SchoolBus Router and School Absence Tracker support the service digitally.

name: Pre-schools
description: Municipal preschool provision for 2,800 children aged 1-6 across 24 units. Managed via PreSchool Admin for applications and waitlists, linked to the national population register for eligibility.

name: Adult education
description: Komvux and SFI programmes for adult learners including Swedish language courses for new residents. 1,100 enrolments per year. Primarily teacher-led with some blended learning via LearningPortal.

name: Building permits
description: Processing of planning and building permit applications under PBL for 3,400 annual submissions. Target: 10 weeks from submission to decision. Fully digitised via PermitFlow. Integrated with CityMap GIS for spatial conflict checks.

name: City planning
description: Long-term land use, zoning and urban development planning including public consultations. ~12,000 citizens engaged annually via public notices and digital participation tools. Managed via Urban Planning Board and CityMap GIS.

name: Citizen portal
description: Single digital front door to 40+ municipal e-services. 28,000 monthly active sessions. BankID authenticated. Covers permit applications, care requests, school enrolment, payments and complaints. Fully managed via CitizenConnect.

name: Financial accounting
description: Core municipal financial management including general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, treasury and budget control. Approximately 850M SEK processed annually. Managed via Proxima Finance (Unit4 ERP). Integrated with tax revenue feed from Skatteverket.

name: HR management
description: People management for 3,400 municipal employees including payroll, recruitment, absence tracking, competence development and employment contracts. In transition from legacy HR Maestro to Visma HR Cloud. Target full migration Q2 2026.

name: District heating
description: Municipal district heating network supplying 14,000 households and businesses. Infrastructure includes 4 production plants, 220 km pipework and 12 substations. Managed via EnergyGrid View and Heating Billing. Target: 100% renewable sources by 2027.

name: Water & sanitation
description: Drinking water treatment and sewage management for all 95,000 municipal residents. Operates 4 treatment plants and 12 pumping stations. Classified as critical national infrastructure. Managed via Water Mgmt SCADA system. Audited annually by Inspektionen for strategiska produkter.
